import ast, sys
files = [
    'edon_gateway/governor.py',
    'edon_gateway/mag_client.py',
    'edon_gateway/schemas/__init__.py',
    'edon_gateway/schemas.py',
    'edon_gateway/config.py',
    'edon_gateway/routes/v1_action.py',
]
ok = True
for f in files:
    try:
        with open\(f\) as fh:
            ast.parse\(fh.read\(\)\)
        print\(f'OK: {f}'\)
    except SyntaxError as e:
        print\(f'SYNTAX ERROR in {f}: {e}'\)
        ok = False
sys.exit\(0 if ok else 1\)
")
